name: Publishing Approval Before Assessment Pipeline
description: Artifact-only workflow where operator approval clears before policy assessment begins.
outcome: Editorial approval is recorded first, then policy assessment runs, and only then does final publishing proceed.

definition.process_instructions: The publication strategist drafts the packet. The publication editor prepares it for editorial approval. Once the operator approves, the policy assessor reviews the approved packet. Only after that assessment clears may the publishing coordinator assemble the final release packet.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: editorial-approval
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

stages.name: policy-assessment
stages.goal: The approved packet is assessed for policy compliance.

stages.name: publication-packaging
stages.goal: The approved and assessed publication packet is ready.
